name: The Legend of Spyro RP
description:
The Legend of Spyro series is a video game trilogy and the first reboot of the Spyro the Dragon franchise, having no continuity with the previous Spyro games before it and establishing an entirely new storyline. Whereas previous Spyro games focused primarily on platforming, this series focuses primarily on action, with a darker and more serious storyline.

Despite having a very tight budget for the production of the games[1], this series was praised by its fans for revitalizing the Spyro the Dragon series. However in 2011, the company of Activision had announced another reboot of Spyro the Dragon in the form of Skylanders, supposedly ending the Legend series. Although this trilogy had ended, The Legend of Spyro series has blown to such proportion among its fans that they have managed to develop a fairly huge cult following based on the Legend of Spyro continuity on the internet.

Games

The Legend of Spyro: A New Beginning

The Legend of Spyro: A New Beginning uses a more action-based focus than previous Spyro installments. It was first announced as the prequel to the original series[6], but it was later changed into a reboot of the entire series. Rather than the previous focus on platforming, the gameplay is now more combat based. Spyro has a variety of combat moves as well as four different breath attacks: fire, electricity, ice and earth, which he can use for both long range and short range attacks. Spyro can also use furies, huge blasts of elemental energy. The game has fewer levels than previous Spyro games, with six levels that progress from a starting point towards a final destination and boss encounter in a linear fashion, and two rail shooter-style flying levels adjoining them.

The Nintendo DS version has additional attacks and challenges. As well as breath attacks and furies, Spyro can create an elemental shield around himself that protects him from enemies while hurting attacking enemies. Also, the DS version has extra side missions in the form of puzzles.

The Legend of Spyro: The Eternal Night
